name: tadeumendonca-skills
description: Reference skills for the tadeumendonca.io platform: the fed-spa-bff architecture blueprint, backend (Hono BFF on Lambda, DynamoDB, observability), frontend (React+Vite SPA, Cognito), AWS infrastructure (Terraform, one skill per service), and CI/CD workflows. Generic, reusable templates (<project>/<apex-domain> placeholders).
